name: register-lookup
title: Register Lookup
description: Search POS registers and stores, connect via VNC/SSH/SFTP, and copy a register's IP — a thin Raycast UI over the same reg-filter.zsh/reg-connect.zsh scripts the Alfred workflow uses.
author: gregorybeal

commands.name: search-registers
commands.title: Search Registers
commands.description: Find a register by hostname, store number, city, state, or regional and connect to it

commands.name: search-stores
commands.title: Search Stores
commands.description: Find a store and connect to every register at it
